audit_findings.finding: JSONL append without flock — concurrent record writers can interleave partial lines causing torn reads
audit_findings.remediation: fcntl.flock(LOCK_EX) around write+flush, LOCK_UN in finally

audit_findings.finding: Non-atomic write to evolve_suggestion.json — crash mid-write leaves truncated/corrupt file
audit_findings.remediation: tempfile.mkstemp + os.fdopen + fsync + os.replace atomic pattern
